description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, spanning PRs #106 through #117. He logged 3 hrs 39 mins of coding time, averaging 54 mins per day. His tracked work was split across 2 projects, with the main languages being Markdown, Python, Other, and SQL.
